job_description:
Job Description

Company: JTSi Technologies India Pvt Ltd Location: Kochi Infopark

Role Overview

The Quality Assurance (QA) Engineer / Test Engineer is responsible for ensuring that all websites, web applications, and digital solutions developed by JTSi meet the highest standards of quality, functionality, performance, security, usability, accessibility, and customer requirements before deployment. The QA Engineer acts as the custodian of quality throughout the website development lifecycle by validating requirements, conducting comprehensive testing, identifying defects, ensuring compliance with standards, and supporting continuous improvement initiatives.

Key Responsibilities

  1. Requirement Review and Quality Planning
  2. Review project requirements, scope documents, and technical specifications.
  3. Participate in project kick-off and requirement review meetings.

  4. Prepare Quality Assurance plans for assigned projects.

  5. Functional Testing

  6. Verify all website functionalities against approved requirements.

  7. Test contact forms, registration forms, login systems, search functionality, payment gateways, membership portals, CRM integrations, API integrations, dynamic content modules, and e-commerce functionality.

  8. User Interface (UI) Testing

  9. Validate layout consistency, navigation flow, fonts, images, color schemes, branding guidelines, and responsive design behavior.

  10. Cross-Browser and Cross-Device Testing

  11. Test websites across Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, Mozilla Firefox, Safari, and validate behavior on desktops, tablets, mobile devices, and different screen resolutions.

  12. Website Performance Testing

  13. Validate page loading speed, core web vitals, page speed metrics, image optimization, caching, and database performance.

  14. SEO Quality Assurance

  15. Verify meta titles, meta descriptions, structured data, XML sitemaps, URL structure, header hierarchy, image alt tags, and internal linking.

  16. Accessibility Compliance Testing

  17. Validate keyboard navigation, screen reader compatibility, contrast ratios, alternative text, and accessible forms.

  18. Security Testing

  19. Perform SSL implementation, user authentication, authorization controls, data protection measures, vulnerability checks, and security plugin validation.

  20. Content and Quality Review

  21. Review website content for grammar, spelling, formatting, broken links, missing images, and incorrect information.

  22. Defect Management

    • Log, track, prioritize, and verify defects. Maintain defect registers and testing reports.

  23. User Acceptance Testing (UAT) Support

    • Coordinate UAT activities, prepare test cases, assist customers during UAT sessions, and track feedback.

  24. Deployment Readiness Verification

    • Conduct pre-launch quality reviews and approve websites for production release.

  25. Post-Go-Live Validation

    • Monitor website functionality post-deployment and validate issue resolution.

  26. Quality Process Improvement

    • Contribute to QA standards, templates, and automation testing initiatives.

Required Qualifications

  • Education: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or related discipline.
  • Experience:
  • QA Engineer: 2–5 years in website testing, software testing, or quality assurance.
  • Senior QA Engineer: 5+ years in website testing and quality assurance.
  • Technical Skills: Website Testing, Functional Testing, Regression Testing, UAT, Cross-Browser Testing, Mobile Responsiveness Testing, SEO Validation, Accessibility Testing, Performance Testing, Security Validation, WordPress Testing, CMS Platforms, API Testing, Bug Tracking Tools, Test Case Design.
  • Preferred Skills: Automation testing tools, Google Lighthouse, GTmetrix, PageSpeed Insights, OWASP security guidelines, SEO auditing tools, AI-enabled website testing.

Core Competencies

  • Attention to Detail
  • Analytical Thinking
  • Problem Solving
  • Customer Focus
  • Communication Skills
  • Documentation Skills
  • Quality Mindset
  • Time Management
  • Team Collaboration

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

  • Defect Detection Rate
  • Defect Leakage Rate
  • Test Coverage Percentage
  • Website Quality Score
  • Customer Acceptance Rate
  • First-Time Pass Rate
  • UAT Success Rate
  • Post-Go-Live Defect Count
  • Project Quality Compliance Score
  • Testing Productivity
